response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior generalist with deep TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and full-stack experience, but the role explicitly requires 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus SQL Server/Oracle and capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge. The resume shows only ~6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments (2014–2015) on LabWindows/CVI, no Windows-platform finance work, no SQL Server/Oracle depth, and no investment banking or fixed income exposure. The mandatory technical and domain bars are not met.
strengths: Strong overall engineering background with 10+ years across backend, systems, and low-latency work
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a Windows-targeted C IDE product
Solid software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows — only a brief C/C++ stint in 2014–2015
No capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle expertise; databases listed are MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain exposure
